title: lilium lancifolium var. splendens
intro: Lilium lancifolium var. splendens, also known as the Tiger Lily, is a popular ornamental plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to East Asia. The plant's rhizomes and bulbs have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tiger Lily include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
